title: Carapod
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Carapods''' were large red, green, and black insects that lived on [[Zonama Sekot/Legends|Zonama Sekot]] and helped with the shipbuilding process. Some were [[Cyborg/Legends|cyborgs]]. Carapods had flat, wide bodies with seven legs: three on each side, and one in the center-front. On either side of the seventh leg grew long gray spurs. Their thick hides contained a high metal content.

Carapods were used as pack animals by [[Langhesi]] forgers to carry [[seed-partner]]s to the forging pits on [[Zonama Sekot/Legends|Zonama Sekot]] during the shaping of them into [[Sekotan Personal Starship|ships]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Rogue Planet]]'' {{1st|in book}}
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic III: Reunion]]''

*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
